data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix employs a microservices architecture to build and deploy scalable applications rapidly.
data.technical_spec: Distributed system with modular services allowing for independent scaling, deployment, and management.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Netflix has a global Content Delivery Network optimized for fast streaming and minimal buffering.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Open Connect appliance at ISP locations to cache content closer to users.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Netflix runs on AWS, leveraging cloud resources for scalability and resilience.
data.technical_spec: Extensive use of EC2 instances, S3 storage, and other AWS services.

data.title: Chaos Engineering
data.description: Netflix pioneered Chaos Monkey and similar tools to ensure system resilience.
data.technical_spec: Regularly conducts fault injection testing to identify system weaknesses.

data.title: Data-Driven Architecture
data.description: Uses advanced data analytics to drive decision-making and personalization.
data.technical_spec: Large-scale data pipelines and machine learning algorithms for content recommendations.
